subcodes.first_line: O blessed leaf of divine Paradise! Although a letter was dispatched a while ago, yet again am I moved to make mention of thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبارکه فردوس الهی اگرچه چندی پیش محرری ارسال شد حال باز بذکر تو
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
